match_nodes.description: Act on the Use of Numbers to Identify a Specific Individual in Administrative Procedures — the law establishing Japan's national ID-number system

data.official_name: Act on the Use of Numbers to Identify a Specific Individual in Administrative Procedures
data.notes: Act No. 27 of 2013, effective January 2016, since amended (2023 round expanding uses). Distinct from APPI (secid:regulation/ppc.go.jp/appi) — a dedicated data-protection regime layered on top for 'Specific Personal Information'. Chapters: I General Provisions, II Individual Number, III Individual Number Card, IV Provision of Specific Personal Information, V Specific Personal Information Protection, VI Personal Information Protection Commission (roughly 57+ articles with supplementary provisions). Oversight split between the Digital Agency (My Number Card operations) and PPC (data protection). Relevant to identity-proofing, national ID data breaches, and cloud services handling 'Specific Personal Information'.
